examples.eng: She wiped lipstick from her mouth.
examples.ru: Она стёрла со рта /с губ/ помаду.

examples.eng: She was wearing bright red lipstick.
She quickly touched up her lipstick.
She put on a little lipstick and blush.
examples.ru: Она нанесла немного помады и румян.

examples.eng: She powdered her face and put on lipstick.
examples.ru: Она припудрила лицо и накрасила губы помадой.

examples.eng: Blot your lipstick with a tissue.
examples.ru: После нанесения помады, промокните её салфеткой.

examples.eng: She rubbed off her lipstick and eye shadow.
